steps.title: Identify what satisfies the art lover
steps.content: The passage describes Chicago's “outstanding collection” and emphasizes variety: “everything from monumental sculptures... to innovative street art.” The sentence ends by saying this art can “satisfy any art lover,” so the blank must describe a quality that enables this universal appeal.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the blank
steps.content:
”Breadth of” means range or variety—precisely what the passage emphasizes and what allows a collection to appeal to all tastes.

The other three introduce negative concepts (controversy, confusion, apathy) that contradict both the positive description of an “outstanding” collection and the logic that universal appeal requires.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
